variables.notes: Used a priority list of single reported finance-cost rows. 'Financial expenses' is preferred because it is closer to gross interest/finance expense than 'Net financial expenses'. Did not use loan/lease interest component rows because XINT should map to a single reported line rather than summing components.

candidates.why: Not book equity.

Balancing row, not the actual equity line.

variables.notes: Selected 'Shareholders equity' because it excludes minority interest, which is mapped separately to MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the balance sheet NCI labels. BE uses 'Shareholders equity', so adding MIB separately avoids double counting.
